HD.rationale: HD trades at a reasonable 23.5x P/E with solid 13.1% operating margins and 8.9% net margins, but the stock is down 11.6% over the past year with negative news sentiment around fraud investigations and consumer uncertainty, creating a mild long lean on mean-reversion potential rather than a clear edge.

Operating margin of 13.1% and ROE of 120.4% demonstrate strong profitability despite headwinds
